title: calamagrostis spicigera
intro: Calamagrostis spicigera, also known as the spike grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Calamagrostis spicigera are numerous, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
